steps.t: The Old Guest-house is in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Ask Húndil in the Old Guest-house for some small ale.
The Wheel and Cask is at the northern end of the First Circle. The Old Guest-house has run out of small ale, but Húndil thinks the Wheel and Cask migh…
The Wheel and Cask is at the northern end of the First Circle. Meldis has invited you to collect all the small ale you want yourself, from her stores.
Bergil stands before the Old Guest-house, south of the City Gates. You should return to Bergil with the small ale you have gathered.
The Lower Stores are just south of the City Gates in the First Circle. Bergil has asked you to procure some victual packages from the butteries of the…
The Lower Stores are just south of the City Gates in the First Circle. Gather parcels of soldiers' victuals from the buttery in the Lower Stores.
Bergil stands before the Old Guest-house, south of the City Gates. You should return to Bergil with the soldiers' victuals.
The Wrights' Market is in the southern reach of the First Circle. Check in the Wrights' Market to see what's become of Landath, who was supposed to be…
Chandler's Lane is on the southern reach of the First Circle. Find out why the chandler is berating Landath out in the street.
Landath stands accused in Chandler's Lane, which is on the southern reach of the First Circle. Talk to Landath to hear his side of the story.
Chandler's Lane is on the southern reach of the First Circle. Vouch for Landath to the chandler.
The Old Guest-house lies in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Go back to Bergil at the Old Guest-house to see how the Gathering preparat…
